case_title: ROGER FREIRE GUEDES VS. 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GUEDES, ROGER FREIRE 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-20-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEDES, ROGER FREIRE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2024 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUEDES, ROGER FREIRE AS TO DEFENDANT 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF ROGER FREIRE GUEDES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC REPRESENTED BY PETER GORENCE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUEDES, ROGER FREIRE AS TO DEFENDANT 1288 HOWARD OWNER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.
